# Accepted-Segment Change Review gold corpus

Every case in this directory is synthetic. Names, prose, SECRET content, record payloads, and identifiers were created only for deterministic tests; no user project, credential, prompt log, or private payload is represented here.

The files are ordered by `scripts/accepted-segment-change-review/corpus.mjs`. Each file contains one complete latest accepted segment, the exact nineteen-field Generation Brief review projection, complete Active Working Set and Whole Project record inputs, expected source accounting, adjudicated findings, all six coverage outcomes, and prohibited inventions.
